python3 << 'EOF'
[?2004l[?2004hwith open('/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp', 'rb') as f:
[?2004l[?2004h    content = f.read()
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h# Check for any null bytes or other unusual bytes
[?2004l[?2004hbad_bytes = []
[?2004l[?2004hfor i, b in enumerate(content):
[?2004l[?2004h    if b == 0:
[?2004l[?2004h        bad_bytes.append(i)
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hif bad_bytes:
[?2004l[?2004h    print(f"Found {len(bad_bytes)} null bytes at positions: {bad_bytes[:10]}")
[?2004l[?2004helse:
[?2004l[?2004h    print("No null bytes found")
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h# Check for other unusual patterns
[?2004l[?2004hif b'\xef\xbb\xbf' in content:
[?2004l[?2004h    print("Found UTF-8 BOM")
[?2004l[?2004h    
[?2004l[?2004h# Check for Windows line endings
[?2004l[?2004hif b'\r\n' in content:
[?2004l[?2004h    print("Found Windows line endings (CRLF)")
[?2004l[?2004h    
[?2004l[?2004h# Check for only CR
[?2004l[?2004hif b'\r' in content and b'\r\n' not in content:
[?2004l[?2004h    print("Found old Mac line endings (CR only)")
[?2004l[?2004hEOF
[?2004lNo null bytes found
[?2004h
